violations.text: The wall in the storage area is in poor repair. Wall was observed with some gaps in foam. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Per PIC work order has already been placed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025

The floor next to the wall in the storage area has an small accumulation of old rodent droppings. The floors in the retail area under shelving was observed with a small accumulation of food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
